title: monitor-summary output
description:
Canonical user-facing tick summary.

Slash-command Step 7 prints headline + body verbatim.
lifecycle_state matches the canonical 'observable_with_timeout'
set; the no-journal case is signaled via journal_missing rather
than a distinct lifecycle value.

lifecycle_state.description: Lifecycle state set used when an observer also surfaces 'timeout' (e.g. status / reconcile reading sidecars previously marked timeout by monitor-flow). Superset of lifecycle_state_observable.
lifecycle_state.title: Lifecycle State

armed_hint.description: One-line note pointing the slash command at decide-monitor-arm; null when terminal.
armed_hint.title: Armed Hint

journal_missing.description: True iff the journal record could not be loaded (e.g. ~/.claude/hpc/<repo_hash>/runs/<run_id>.json absent). When True, headline carries an explicit no-journal message and lifecycle_state defaults to 'abandoned' (the closest semantic match — record gone).
journal_missing.title: Journal Missing
